_doc: Map a player's PlayGM overall_grade to the rarity tier of the PlayGM scout card granted by /cards/scan. Per the IP policy doc, the physical card's rarity is irrelevant — only the player's PlayGM grade decides. Lower grades fall back to common with a 'needs more games' badge so we never grant a barren card. Mirrors the Rarity enum in cardScanLLM.ts.
_low_grade_badge_doc: When the granted rarity is 'common' AND the player's grade is at or below C+, attach the 'needs_more_games' badge so the kid sees that the player's PlayGM book just hasn't seen enough games yet.
_already_owned_doc: When the user already owns a scout card for this player, the route falls through to Option B from card-scan-ip-policy.md: polite deny + 50 PP refresh consolation.
